data.author: Franki Hobson
data.title: How a journey through Japan connects you to what matters most
data.description: The Japanese have a word for purpose: ikigai. It describes the quiet intersection between what you love, what gives life meaning, and how you connect to the world around you. Travelling through Japan has a way of revealing this gently, through ritual, seasonality and moments of presence.

data.author: Sinisa Markovic
data.title: Attackers keep finding the same gaps in security programs
data.description: Attackers keep getting in, often through the same predictable weak spots: identity systems, third-party access, and poorly secured perimeter devices. A new threat report from Barracuda based on Managed XDR telemetry from 2025 shows that many successful incidents still start with basic access and configuration failures, not advanced malware. The report draws on more than two trillion IT events, nearly 600,000 security alerts, and more than 300,000 protected assets monitored over the year. Barracuda’s SOC … More →The post Attackers keep finding the same gaps in security programs...

data.title: Bulldogs are Vegas-bound … but why wasn’t Gus on the plane?
data.description: Canterbury on Thursday became the first team to fly out for the season opener, but club supremo Phil Gould was a notable absentee, having delayed his flight for 48 hours.

data.author: Melania Watson
data.title: Roy Morgan Survey Reveals 2.5M Young Aussies Watch YouTube
data.description: According to the latest Roy Morgan Young Australian Survey (YAS), 2.5 million Australian kids aged 6-13 have their eyes glued to YouTube. Based on 2021 Australian Bureau of Statistics Census data, there are approximately 2.5 to 2.6 million children aged 6-13 in Australia, which means an estimated 89 per cent of the age group are […]

data.title: Pubs to open late for home nations World Cup knockout games
data.description: Football fans in the UK will be able to enjoy an extra round at the pub thanks to new rules during the men's World Cup.

data.title: Israel faces criticism at UN Security Council
data.description: U.K. foreign secretary accuses Israel of ‘strangling’ Palestinians' economy and says more than 600 Gazans killed since ceasefire; UN peace official warns of worsening situation in West Bank; U.S. ambassador blames Hamas, praises Trump Gaza plan

data.author: KENNINGTON SMITH III
data.title: Darius Acuff Jr. scores 49 points against Alabama and nearly delivers in OT for Arkansas
data.description: Wearing a protective boot earlier this week, Arkansas star Darius Acuff Jr. snapped back when coach John Calipari asked if he was going to miss Wednesday night's game at Alabama. Not only did Acuff play, but he dazzled. Acuff scored 49 points — the second most in a single game in college basketball this season — and carried Arkansas much of the night.

data.author: Lance Peterson, News Reporter
data.title: UI, Iowa City Downtown District host first event in First Round Series
data.description: Roughly 40 people attended the first event of the Iowa City Downtown District’s First Round Series Wednesday at Prairie Lights Cafe in collaboration with the University of Iowa Office of Innovation.
